ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "consent" INTEGER /* User consent for data collection and marketing */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the session in minutes */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., mobile, desktop, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_name" TEXT /* Name of the song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist who performed the song */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the song in seconds */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the song belongs to */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the song has explicit content */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the activity occurred */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song involved in the activity */,
  "item_in_session" INTEGER /* Order of the song within the session */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code for the activity */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method used for the activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., mobile, desktop, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_information ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song play */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the song */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the song was played */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was played */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the song was played */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the play */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the play */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., mobile, desktop, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_plays_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_plays_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_information ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_plays_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_plays_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was feedback on */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., like, dislike, replay) */,
  "feedback_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was given */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the feedback */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the feedback */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., mobile, desktop, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_feedback_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_information ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_feedback_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_information" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uses the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the platform */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access from the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_information_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ads" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was shown the ad */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the ad was shown */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the ad in seconds */,
  "display_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ad was displayed */,
  "ad_content" TEXT /* Content of the ad */,
  "ad_url" TEXT /* URL of the ad */,
  "ad_clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the ad */,
  "ad_impression" INTEGER /* Number of times the ad was displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was recommended the song */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song that was recommended */,
  "recommendation_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recommendation was made */,
  "response" TEXT /* User's response to the recommendation */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the recommendation */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the recommendation */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the recommendation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES device_information ("device_id")
)
